sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, str1 String, str2 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, '我是谁', '我是我'), (2, '', 'не знаю'), (3, 'hello', 'hallo');
SELECT id, editDistanceUTF8(str1, str2) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE distance > 1;
SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE (editDistanceUTF8(str1, str2) > 1) OR (editDistanceUTF8(str2, '') > 0);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_strings GROUP BY id HAVING editDistanceUTF8(str1, str2) < 3;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, editDistanceUTF8(str1, str2) AS distance FROM test_strings;
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM temp_table WHERE distance <= (SELECT MAX(distance) FROM temp_table);
SELECT str1, str2 FROM test_strings WHERE (editDistanceUTF8(str1, str2) = 1) AND (LENGTH(str1) > 0);
INSERT INTO test_strings SELECT id, '你好', '你好吗' FROM test_strings WHERE editDistanceUTF8(str1, str2) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT str1 FROM test_strings WHERE editDistanceUTF8(str1, str2) IS NULL OR (str1 > str2);
